item.title: What?! No egg cups?!
item.description: For the record, I keep chickens and I don't refrigerate my eggs. However, I do hard boil them and I don't use egg cups. #facepalm
item.dc:creator: peterfunkle

item.title: The "Make my brother jump" Prank (and Mom smile)
item.dc:creator: epicurusaquinas

item.title: Wow…
item.description: Thought I’d take a break from all the terrible things happening in Ukraine and focus on terrible things happening here for a moment. Even in the best of systems I’m against the death penalty. But our system is so broken that’s even more reason why we shouldn’t have it. It’s crazy how difficult it is to appeal a case once it’s been decided. Even though that appeal process is supposed to be there to catch cases like this. It just isn’t working right now. Likely due to the Antiterrorism and Effective Death Penalty Act (AEDC) which just seems to show that everytime we go after something in vengeance (this was a response to the Oklahoma Bombing) we just make things worse. This case is particularly crazy. Just the fact the D.A. who prosecuted her is current in prison is very telling. I’m not terribly sad I left Texas. Although I really do hope the good people there can do something to change it. Anyways I don’t really have a following or a vibrant social media presence but I thought I’d at least try and get this petition more views.#SaveMelissaLucio Edit: An article that I thought was interesting. Mainly talks of the documentary they did. Is a little dated at this point. https://www.texasmonthly.com/arts-entertainment/did-melissa-lucio-the-first-hispanic-woman-on-death-row-in-texas-kill-her-daughter-an-uneven-new-documentary-raises-more-questions-than-answers/amp/ https://innocenceproject.org/petitions/stop-execution-of-innocent-melissa-lucio-texas/
item.dc:creator: TheRedCat13

item.dc:creator: epicurusaquinas

item.title: Sounds like Christmas all year round
item.description:
Can’t be too mad about it because they’re so darn cute and have healed a little bit of my broken heart.
Meet Gabby. She’s a short haired red with nice black pinstriping on her ears
And her sister Xena. She’s a long haired with every color mixed in. She looks very grayish in the sun.
Taking a mulch nap. They’re perfect
item.dc:creator: kimbaloo

item.title: I’m depressed
item.description: You wait until you’re financially stable, healing from a lifetime of trauma and abuse, you’re with the person you’re meant to be with, you’re finally… there. IUIs, medications, preparing your body for a baby that just doesn’t seem to want to happen. IVF is our last option. I do not want a surrogate. Maybe we will adopt. I only wanted the chance to raise some good humans. Today sucks. Viral Edit: I made this to scream into the void and now I’m sitting here sobbing over all the kind words. I never even wanted kids until I met my husband. I had actually decided when I was 18 that I didn’t want kids. Watching him be a dad gave me hope. Now we want one together and it’s just exhausting. Thank you all, truly.
item.dc:creator: PrincessCuntCake

item.title: I like doodling maps
item.description:
I use Google maps as my reference.
Same doodle, just a bit more tilty.
Same.
Different place this time.
All are done using pencil, ink then watercolour.
item.dc:creator: ronnietucker

item.title: The latest in my Hairstyle Recreation series, hairstyles from video game characters!
item.dc:creator: GingerSnark

item.title: Dating height requirements
item.description: I get it. Everyone is allowed to be attracted to whatever they're attracted to. It still hurts, it's the ONE thing i can't do anything about. We'd been talking daily for a few weeks, planned to meet up for coffee once she finished a work project. We'd even talked about how awful online dating is, and how she kept getting ghosted herself, and all guys were just interested in sex etc. I thought we really connected. Instead I'm adding my height to my ever growing list of "disclosures" like it's a flipping venereal disease. This app doesn't ask for your height, so i guess I'm supposed to put it in my bio. "I don't drink, i travel full time, and I'm only 5'7", in case any of those are deal breakers". Good lord, is this really what dating has come to?! Just screaming into the void, down vote away. Edit for all the people saying I'm making assumptions. She asked, i replied, then crickets. I really don't think I'm jumping to conclusions here FP edit: THIS whiney shit gets to FP?! I don't understand imgur. Send invites not nudes, i want to leave the U.S. for somewhere cool
item.dc:creator: r0b074p0c4lyp53

item.title: Cooking is my favorite craft
item.description: For my 32nd birthday last week, I recreated the Third Tier Canteen meal from Monster Hunter World, upscaled slightly to feed more of my friends. FP Edit: HOLY KULU-YA-KU! Didn't expect this! I knew imgurians were thirsty but didn't realize how hungry you all were! For those asking (from left to right): Swiss cheese, french bread, garlic butter, Roast potatoes, Spanish Paella, Garlic Top Round Beef, Lobster Bisque, Lemon Pepper Shrimp Skewers, Teriyaki Chicken Skewer, Honey-Apple Pork Skewer Skewer. In the white jar was a Fortified Raspberry Honey Wine.
item.dc:creator: Pdt270

item.title: My Panic Cosplay at Katsucon
item.description:
My friends and I had the idea to do cosplays based off of Hades and his two sidekicks Pain and Panic. I had to get the Herculade cup so I could recreate this shot lol
We made these costumes ourselves cause we all love to sew!
Hades is siberiathequeen Pain is flavoredk_ My Insta is pumpkin.pixie.princess And the photographer is allthingslaurenphoto

item.dc:creator: loadingartist

item.title: One crafty BEACH-dwelling maker
item.description:
Hey Imgur, Rachel here- your resident crafter-in-chief, just saying hello!
I measure, melt, mix, and pour every last batch of everything I sell- candles/melts, lip balms, sugar scrubs, and salt soaks.
Yesterday I made 500 lip balms. People ask how it's done. Its easy! Measure, Melt, Mix, Pour, Cap, Label, Done.
There's also capping. This part feels like it takes approximately forever. Thankful for podcasts that keep me company! (Always up for podcsst recommendations!!)
And the labels. All the labels. So many labels. Don't f*cking start with me about getting an automatic label machine- I AM THE MACHINE (I hope you read that last line in the Walter White I AM THE ONE WHO KNOCKS voice, as intended).
Moisturizing balm is my ORIGINAL product and my favorite to make. The whole process is zen. Pouring balm is like a meditation. I have made thousands of these start to finish over the past 8 years.
Hows the weather? I'd say it's balmy.... and I'll see myself out.
What do I do with all that stuff?! I throw it into my trusty gal VanNessa and head to a festival! I've done events in a dozen states since starting back in 2014.
The trick is to show up and make all of that look EFFORTLESS.
Sometimes you get to meet Shaq filming the small business Saturday commercial at one of your local retailers- one of my cooler small business owning moments.
Most times it's just me and my thoughts making products and shipping orders, unloading pallets, endless seemingly fruitless attempts at organization, setting up and working festivals. Its a good life.
Silly photo shoots with my friends result in photos like this. Back in mid-2020, I made a post pleading with imgur to help save my business because covid shut us down. You guys responded in the best way! Not only did you save my business, I used my funds to begin hosting very small local craft shows that have helped save and sustain over TWO HUNDRED small art and handmade businesses since July 2020. Thank you so much, imgur, for being such a loving, supportive community with real world results. I literally wouldn't still be doing this without you wonderful weirdos. Original post: https://imgur.com/gallery/LyhDuor For those interested in my shop: Www.rachelmadeproducts.com Www.etsy.com/shop/rachelmadeproducts/
Cat tax: sound on as Jerry says STAY WEIRD IMGUR (and stay crafty!) FP EDIT STORY TIME: when I met Shaq, we all took a group photo after the photo I posted above. I'm next to Shaq, and like a normal person I put my arm around him at which point he looks down at me and asks my name. In a loud, booming voice I hear Shaq say RACHEL'S TOUCHING MY BUTT, Y'ALL at which point I realize my arm is, in fact, draped directly across his butt... short people problems!!! Thanks for the love, imgur!
item.dc:creator: EnigmaWearingHeels

item.title: There is a torii gate made of speakers in Kamiyama, Tokushima. You can connect your phone to it and play anything.
item.dc:creator: AtomicAerials

item.title: I etch a sketched Sailor Moon
item.description:
When I chose to don the proverbial crown as Princess Etch, my inspiration came from none other than Princess Serenity.
Sailor Moon continues to serve as an inspiration for my art, my fashion and my brand. I'm often asked if it's possible to make Etch A Sketch art permanent. It is! You can see my preservation process here: https://imgur.com/gallery/Bhxng68
item.dc:creator: pikajane

item.title: Wednesday meme dump!
item.description:
These are absolutely hilarious!
100%
Remember
Lol
But God, how much didn't we love them though?
Happy Wednesday guys! I am SO hungover today, went to a Women's day event yesterday, got very drunk, overslept, didn't have time to wash my hair and have had to explain to all my coworkers why I have so much glitter in my hair on a regular Wednesday, haha.
item.dc:creator: Miiaka

Front view
I made this to distract my self from the stress of university. Hope you like it as much as I do. Edit. I followed this tutorial and it was really simpel so try it yourself. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QI-Qu1FNUio
item.dc:creator: luiepaduchy

item.title: Perlers are crafty!
item.description:
My most popular piece - Hornet from Hollow Knight
Windwaker - I had to tape some beads together because I ran out of pegboards!
Zenyatta - Overwatch
Atma Weapon - Final Fantasy 6
Jurassic Park
The Reaper from Skul BEFORE the redesign - I really like the melancholy of this one
Daffy duck - Looney Tunes
Skyrim
Blade of Chaos - God of War
Cacodemon - Doom
The Simpsons
Head Crab - Half Life
Wilbur - Animal Crossing
Metroid
Legendary difficulty - Halo
Plague Doctor - Darkest Dungeon
Vivi - Final Fantasy 9
Double Sunflower - Plants Vs Zombies
Electric Mayhem - The Muppets
Futurama is brought to you by Thompsons teeth! The only teeth strong enough to eat other teeth!
Toph - Avatar the Last Airbender
Castle Crashers
Bioshock
Calvin and Hobbes
Shmebulock - Gravity Falls
GLaDOS - Portal
The Island of Myst
Ghostbusters
Daruk - Breath of the Wild
Viruses from Dr Mario 64 - I redid a lot of the coloring.
Sparkster - Rocket Knight Adventures
And here's my office! It's where I hang them all up! I recently rearranged them to make more room because I have a Shadow of the Colossus and an Over the Garden Wall piece planned and they might be a bit big. Let me know if you have any questions! Perler beads can be very Zen and honestly it's a pretty inexpensive craft/hobby
item.dc:creator: Malcomfox
